dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 9750 IH: Public Service Retirement Tax Relief Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Lawler introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Ways and Means

form.official-title: To amend the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 to establish a cap on income taxes on certain pensions.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Public Service Retirement Tax Relief Act of 2026.

section.header: Cap on income taxes on certain pensions

subsection.text: Section 1 of the Internal Revenue Code of 1986 is amended by adding at the end the following new subsection:

subsection.header: Special rule for individuals receiving certain pensions

paragraph.text: The amount of tax imposed under this chapter may not exceed the sum of—

subparagraph.text: $10,000 ($20,000 in the case of a qualified joint return).

paragraph.text: For purposes of this subsection, the term non-pension tax amount means the amount of tax imposed under this chapter, determined without regard to income received from a pension provided by a State or local government.
For purposes of this subsection, the term qualified joint return means a return of tax filed jointly by spouses who each receive income from a pension provided by a State or local government.

subsection.text: The amendments made by this section shall apply to taxable years beginning after December 31, 2025.
